How it works

From sign-up to payout, in four steps

Create your profile

Creators connect their social accounts. Brands set up a business profile.

Step 1

Discover & apply

Brands post campaigns, creators apply, or brands invite creators directly.

Step 2

Collaborate

Chat, share drafts, and finalize the content together.

Step 3

Get paid safely

Payment is held in escrow and released once the work is approved.

Step 4

Built for both sides

Whether you create or you hire

For Creators

Turn your following into income.

  • 1Connect Instagram, TikTok, YouTube & Facebook
  • 2Get discovered by real brands across Nepal
  • 3Apply to paid campaigns and open events
  • 4Get paid securely via eSewa, Khalti, or Fonepay
For Brands

Find and hire the right creators, fast.

  • 1Search creators by category, location & budget
  • 2Post a campaign or invite creators directly
  • 3Track proposals and progress in one dashboard
  • 4Pay only when the work is approved

Creators discover each other too

Search fellow creators collaboration request who match your interests — by location or category anywhere in Nepal — send a message request, and start the conversation, ready for your next collaboration.

BiratnagarCreator 1
RajbirajCreator 2

Security

Built on trust

Every account and every payment is protected.

Verified creators

Identity confirmed with citizenship document verification.

Escrow payments

Funds are held safely until the work is approved.

ID & contact verification

Email, phone, and document checks for every account.

Transparent reviews

Every collaboration ends with an honest rating.

Success stories

Ready to get started?
